description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the hashicorp/terraform:light Docker image with a custom entrypoint and PATH, caching the .terraform directory and running a before_script that prints the Terraform version, initializes the working directory, and copies terraform.tfvars.dist to terraform.tfvars, and defining a PLAN variable set to plan.tfplan. Define three stages: validate, build, and deploy. In the validate stage add a validate job that executes `terraform validate`. In the build stage add a plan job that runs `terraform plan -var "do_token=$do_token" -var "do_ssh_keys=$do_ssh_keys" -var "warrior_username=$warrior_username" -var "warrior_password=$warrior_password" -var "warrior_downloader=$warrior_downloader" -out=$PLAN` and publishes the generated $PLAN file as an artifact named plan. In the deploy stage add an apply job that depends on the plan job, is manual, only runs on the master branch, targets the production environment, and runs `terraform apply $PLAN`.
